svg.text: NAME:
aws-ssm-params import - Import parameter values from stdin
USAGE:
aws-ssm-params [global options] import [command options]
OPTIONS:
--map-field string [ --map-field string ] field mapping as aws_field:file_field; repeat for multiple mappings
--format string input format: dotenv, json, or yaml (default: "dotenv")
--key-field string AWS field to use as object/map key for JSON or YAML records
--root-path string SSM path prefix for relative imported names
--on-create string when an imported parameter does not exist: skip, error, or ask
--on-update string when an imported parameter already exists: skip, error, or ask
--continue-on-error continue importing remaining records after per-record errors
--summary print an import summary after processing records
--default-type string default parameter type: string, string-list, or secure-string
--default-tier string default parameter tier: standard, advanced, or intelligent-tiering
--default-data-type string default parameter data type: text, aws:ec2:image, or aws:ssm:integration
--default-region string default AWS region for imported records without region metadata
--default-description string default parameter description
--default-policies string default parameter policies JSON
--default-policies-file string read default parameter policies JSON from file
--help, -h show help
GLOBAL OPTIONS:
--region string [ --region string ] AWS region; repeat the flag for multiple regions; env accepts comma-separated values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_REGION]
--all-regions search parameters across all enabled AWS regions [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_ALL_REGIONS]
--profile string AWS profile [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_PROFILE]
--no-color disable colored output [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_NO_COLOR]
--keymap string keyboard navigation style: emacs or vi (default: "emacs") [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_KEYMAP]
--log-level string log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, or off (default: "off") [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_LOG_LEVEL]
--filters-file string file with filter groups; one OR group per line [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_FILTER_FILE]
--filter string [ --filter string ] filter group; conditions inside one value are separated by semicolons; env accepts comma-separated values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_FILTER]
